title: Proclamation No. 1239, s. 2007
text:
MALACAÑANG Manila

PROCLAMATION NO. 1239

DECLARING FRIDAY, MARCH 2, 2007, AS SPECIAL (NON-WORKING) DAY IN THE PROVINCE OF LA UNION

WHEREAS , Friday, March 2, 2007, marks the 157 th Foundation Day anniversary of the Province of La Union;

WHEREAS , it is but fitting and proper that the people of the Province of La Union be given full opportunity to celebrate the occasion with appropriate ceremonies.

NOW, THEREFORE, I, EDUARDO R. ERMITA , Executive Secretary, by authority of Her Excellency, GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO , do hereby declare Friday, March 2, 2007, as special (non-working) day in the Province of La Union.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF , I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done in the City of Manila, this 12th day of February, in the year of Our Lord, Two Thousand and Seven.

By authority of the President: (Sgd.) EDUARDO R. ERMITA Executive Secretary

By the Executive Secretary: (Sgd.) JOAQUIN C. LAGONERA Senior Deputy Executive Secretary

Source : CDAsia
